> ⚠️ **IMPORTANT**: If this is a critical security vulnerability, please **do not** open a public issue.
> Instead, email us directly at **security@mambacoding.com** with full details.
> We will respond within 48 hours.

## Affected Component

- [ ] mc-woo-remote-automations
- [ ] mc-remote-api
- [ ] Both plugins

## Severity

- [ ] Critical (remote code execution, authentication bypass)
- [ ] High (privilege escalation, sensitive data exposure)
- [ ] Medium (CSRF, XSS, limited data exposure)
- [ ] Low (minor information disclosure)
